case_title: SADLER PROPERTIES VS MEDINA JUAN JR.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JUAN JR.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JUAN JR.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JUAN JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SADLER PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDINA JUAN JR. $1,448.25 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,488.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,448.25 FILED BY SADLER PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JUAN JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
